# ResultTypeInterpretation.Recognized property

`true` when [`ResultType`](./ResultType.md) is one of the spec-defined values, or when the field was absent/null and therefore defaulted to `"complete"`. When `false`, the receiver MUST treat the whole response as an error and MUST NOT read any other result members (R-3.6-f, R-3.6-g).

```csharp
public bool Recognized { get; set; }
```
